items.title: RT by @ChrisCamillo: RT by @ChrisCamillo: CHRIS CAMILLO SAYS PREDICTION MARKETS AREN'T A NICHE PRODUCT. HE CALLS THEM A TROJAN HORSE INTO THE ENTIRE STOCK MARKET @ChrisCamillo says prediction markets take the most engaging things happening in the world and give people a reason to argue about odds with friends across social media. He thinks that's genuinely fun, and it's going to bring people together. For the people who criticise Robinhood saying "this is just gambling" ... Chris says zero-day options can be viewed the same way, and Schwab and Fidelity both offer those. In his view, prediction markets are simply another way people express a bias, just currently concentrated in sports. Chris
items.content:
CHRIS CAMILLO SAYS PREDICTION MARKETS AREN'T A NICHE PRODUCT. HE CALLS THEM A TROJAN HORSE INTO THE ENTIRE STOCK MARKET

 @ChrisCamillo says prediction markets take the most engaging things happening in the world and give people a reason to argue about odds with friends across social media. 

He thinks that's genuinely fun, and it's going to bring people together.

For the people who criticise Robinhood saying "this is just gambling" ... Chris says zero-day options can be viewed the same way, and Schwab and Fidelity both offer those. In his view, prediction markets are simply another way people express a bias, just currently concentrated in sports.

Chris said he thinks that once prediction markets expand beyond sports to cover everything, that becomes a potential multi-trillion dollar market

He thinks prediction markets retrain how people think, by getting them used to reasoning in probabilities and outcomes regularly. His words: 

"I think prediction markets is essentially a Trojan horse to bring the world into the investor class." 
Video

— @WOLF_Financial Jul 23, 2026

items.title: Comical watching Finance X melt down over $GOOG price action within minutes of earnings. Learn to regulate your nervous system. AI is creating one of the most manic, confused markets we’ve ever seen. Expect the unexpected. Over the longer term, high-conviction, well-researched investors who can sit through the noise are likely to be rewarded.

items.title: One of the hardest and most important traits every investor must develop.
items.content:
One of the hardest and most important traits every investor must develop.WOLF (@WOLF_Financial)HERE IS CHRIS CAMILLO'S ADVICE TO YOUNG INVESTORS 

"This market will destroy you if you get overconfident in your own ability." -  @ChrisCamillo 

Chris constantly attacks his own thesis, he asks his own community to prove him wrong, and the moment he's wrong, he acts on it immediately.

"The second that I'm wrong on it, I will reverse. I will literally get out of that trade, and sometimes I will just take the opposite point of view, even if I talked about it on my show and I look like an idiot. I don't care."

His bar isn't being right. It's being willing to be very wrong, in public, without hesitating to reverse course. 
Video
  —  https://x.com/WOLF_Financial/status/2078533452417179833 
— Chris Camillo (@ChrisCamillo) Jul 18, 2026
